message:
refactor(select): remove poll-all-for-initialization pattern

Revert SelectAll and SelectAllDrain to short-circuit on first
Ready result instead of polling ALL futures before returning.

The previous pattern polled every future even after finding a
winner, ostensibly to ensure JoinFuture Drop could abort tasks.
This was incorrect: select semantics require that losers are
dropped (not polled), and the Drop impl handles cancellation.
Polling losers unnecessarily could cause side effects and
violated the principle of least surprise. Cancel-correctness
is the responsibility of the future's Drop, not the selector.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
